creator: dmitriy.morozovsky@gmail.com
text:
when I try to install NGINX via ports (portupgrade), I failed.

===>  License BSD accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for nginx-1.4.7_1,2
=> agentzh-encrypted-session-nginx-module-v0.03-0-g49d741b.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /distfiles/.

fetch: https://github.com/agentzh/encrypted-session-nginx-module/tarball/v0.03/agentzh-encrypted-session-nginx-module-v0.03-0-g49d741b.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: https://github.com/agentzh/encrypted-session-nginx-module/tarball/v0.03/agentzh-encrypted-session-nginx-module-v0.03-0-g49d741b.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
agentzh-encrypted-session-nginx-module-v0.03-0-g49d741b.tar.gz           0  B    0  Bps
=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 8947, actual 8954)
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/agentzh-encrypted-session-nginx-module-v0.03-0-g49d741b.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/agentzh-encrypted-session-nginx-module-v0.03-0-g49d741b.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/nginx
===>  Cleaning for nginx-1.4.7_1,2
build of /usr/ports/www/nginx ended at Fri Apr 25 19:19:31 UTC 2014
build time: 00:00:06


my port three is updated !

How-To-Repeat: portinstall -p nginx
or
cd /usr/pors/www/nginx
make install clean
